steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is “Every last second of space shuttle mission STS-79, which lasted ten days and three hours.” The determiner “every” paired with the singular noun “second” makes this a singular subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule of subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to take a singular verb, and “was” is the only singular form available. The other choices (“have been,” “are,” “were”) are all plural forms that violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
